commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds Control UI tracking for deferred assistant thinking in selected `session.message` events and uses it to reload WebChat history on terminal final events, with focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +59, Tests +314. Total +373 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR body gives a concrete gateway event order and real browser proof, and source inspection shows current main skips history reload for renderable final payloads even when deferred transcript thinking exists.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair is available: preserve the deferred-thinking reload while preventing the live final assistant payload from surviving as a duplicate after history reload.

target.title: fix(ui): reload WebChat history for deferred thinking
target.body:
Fixes #91727.

## Summary

WebChat now reloads the selected transcript at the end of a run when a deferred persisted `session.message` already contains assistant thinking/reasoning but the live final chat payload only contains renderable answer text. That restores the post-run repaint that makes persisted reasoning visible without a manual browser refresh, while preserving the no-reload path for normal source-reply finals.

## Root cause

The final chat-event path avoided `loadChatHistory()` whenever a terminal final event carried renderable assistant text, even if an earlier `session.message` during the same active run had the persisted assistant message with thinking content. That meant the live UI kept the final text payload and never re-projected the transcript thinking block until the user manually refreshed.

## What changed

- Track whether a deferred, selected assistant `session.message` contains thinking content while a chat run is active.
- Treat a final event as needing history reload when that deferred transcript thinking is missing from the final live payload.
- Keep the scope tight to the selected/equivalent session and selected agent/global alias so stale or cross-session finals do not reload the visible chat.
- Ignore user messages that contain literal thinking-like text.
- Preserve the existing source-reply no-flicker path when there is no deferred transcript thinking to recover.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: a persisted assistant message containing a `thinking` block arrives via `session.message` during an active WebChat run, then the terminal `chat` final event carries only renderable assistant text. Before this fix, the final payload stayed live and the thinking block remained hidden until a manual refresh. After this fix, the final event calls `loadChatHistory()` once and the selected chat state is replaced with the persisted transcript containing the thinking block.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout at PR head `260f6a5aec349889942965d24a76fe687efd3818` on macOS using the repo Node/pnpm toolchain, plus the actual Control UI running in headless Google Chrome through the repo Vite e2e server. The browser connected to a gateway-shaped WebSocket endpoint, received the same event order from the report (persisted assistant `session.message` with thinking during an active run, then a terminal `chat` final payload), requested `chat.history`, and repainted WebChat from the persisted transcript without a manual refresh.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```text
PLAYWRIGHT_CHROMIUM_EXECUTABLE_PATH="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" \
  node --import tsx --input-type=module <<'EOF'
# Launches the repo Vite e2e server, opens the real Control UI in Chrome,
# installs a gateway-shaped WebSocket endpoint, sends session.message thinking
# before the terminal chat final event, waits for WebChat to reload history,
# and prints the observed browser state plus gateway request log.
EOF

pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts
git diff --check
OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm run check:changed
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
$ pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  78 passed (78)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 1.42s

$ OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm run check:changed
[check:changed] lanes=core, coreTests
[check:changed] ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts: core test
[check:changed] ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts: core production
[check:changed] ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.test.ts: core test
[check:changed] ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.ts: core production
PASS direct dependency pin guard: checked 467 directly declared dependency specs across 156 tracked package manifests; 0 violations.
PASS package patch guard: no new pnpm patches; 4 legacy patches allowlisted.
runtime-sidecar-loaders: local runtime sidecar loaders look OK.
Import cycle check: 0 runtime value cycle(s).
```

Additional live WebChat/gateway proof after ClawSweeper review:

```json
{
  "pr": 91810,
  "head": "260f6a5aec349889942965d24a76fe687efd3818",
  "baseUrl": "http://127.0.0.1:49175/",
  "screenshotPath": "/Users/andy/openclaw-91727-webchat-live-reasoning/.artifacts/pr91810-webchat-thinking-proof.png",
  "thinkingBeforeFinal": 0,
  "renderedThinkingText": "Reasoning:\nprivate live proof reasoning block",
  "finalTextVisibleCount": 2,
  "appState": {
    "chatRunId": null,
    "chatThinkingLevel": "on",
    "chatShowThinking": true,
    "messageCount": 3,
    "chatMessages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "text",
            "text": "Think then answer"
          }
        ],
        "timestamp": 100
      },
      {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "thinking",
            "thinking": "private live proof reasoning block"
          },
          {
            "type": "text",
            "text": "Final answer from WebChat proof"
          }
        ],
        "timestamp": 101
      },
      {
        "role": "assistant",
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "text",
            "text": "Final answer from WebChat proof"
          }
        ],
        "timestamp": 102
      }
    ],
    "pendingSessionMessageReloadSessionKey": null,
    "pendingSessionMessageReloadHasThinking": false
  },
  "gatewayRequestMethods": [
    "connect",
    "sessions.subscribe",
    "sessions.messages.subscribe",
    "chat.startup",
    "agent.identity.get",
    "health",
    "models.authStatus",
    "agents.list",
    "agents.files.list",
    "sessions.list",
    "chat.history"
  ],
  "chatHistoryRequests": [
    {
      "sessionKey": "main",
      "limit": 100
    }
  ]
}
```


Observed result after fix: The real browser WebChat page rendered `Reasoning:\nprivate live proof reasoning block` after the terminal final event without a manual refresh. The app state had `chatRunId: null`, `chatThinkingLevel: "on"`, persisted assistant content containing the thinking block, and cleared deferred reload flags. The gateway request list includes `chat.history` for `sessionKey: "main"`, proving the terminal final event caused the transcript repaint. The focused UI tests also verify `loadChatHistory()` is called exactly once for the deferred-thinking final path, while cross-session and literal user thinking-text guards do not reload.

What was not tested: I did not run a live external provider WebChat session because the reported bug is the Control UI/gateway event ordering after the provider has already produced a persisted assistant message. The after-fix proof exercises the browser WebChat page and gateway message path without requiring provider credentials.

## Validation

```text
pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat-event-reload.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts
git diff --check
OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm run check:changed
git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD
```

Commit author verification:

```text
260f6a5aec Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com> fix(ui): reload webchat history for deferred thinking
```

Open PR overlap checked before publishing: direct `#91727` search returned no open PRs. Broader WebChat/reasoning searches found adjacent stream-delivery/sanitization PRs (#87481, #79687, #90924, #90186) but no open PR covering the final history reload path for #91727.
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
